name: Ethan Hayes
learned: Ethan Hayes is a skeptic who initially doubted the existence of other dimensions. His logical and analytical mindset makes him a valuable asset to the group, especially when the team needs to analyze situations critically. However, his beliefs begin to shift as he encounters the supernatural firsthand.
currently: Ethan Hayes is now grappling with the reality of the dimensional gateways and the supernatural occurrences in town. As the group's skeptic, he often challenges their theories but is slowly coming to terms with the unexplainable events around them.
lifestyle: Ethan typically spends his time studying and analyzing data, whether it's about the strange happenings in town or trying to come up with logical explanations for the supernatural. His evenings are often spent questioning the group's findings and suggesting alternate explanations.
